title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-target-group-attributes (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-target-group-attributes: "stickiness.enabled=true,stickiness.type=source_ip"
Used on: Service
The
AWS load balancer controller
uses this annotation.
See
annotations
in the AWS load balancer controller documentation.

Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-target-node-labels: "kubernetes.io/os=Linux,topology.kubernetes.io/region=us-east-2"
Kubernetes' official integration with AWS uses this annotation to determine which
nodes in your cluster should be considered as valid targets for the load balancer.
